info.name: HomeX API - Single File Collection
info.description:
HomeX backend uchun bitta faylli Postman collection.

Ishlatish tartibi:
1. base_url ni kerak bolsa o'zgartiring: http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/v1
2. Client Auth / Send OTP ni yuboring.
3. otp_code variablega real OTP kodni yozing va Verify OTP ni yuboring.
4. Verify OTP client_access_token/client_refresh_token ni avtomatik saqlaydi.
5. Master Auth / Login master_access_token/master_refresh_token ni avtomatik saqlaydi.
6. Protected REST requestlar Authorization: Bearer {{..._access_token}} header bilan ishlaydi.
7. WebSocket requestlarda ham token faqat Authorization header orqali yuboriladi; URL query token ishlatilmaydi.

Eslatma: sample *_id variablelar real DBdagi IDlar bilan to'ldirilmasa, ayrim requestlarda 400 yoki 404 chiqishi normal. Muhimi, 500 bo'lmasligi kerak.

item.name: 00 - Setup & Public
item.description: Public docs/schema/privacy endpointlar va collection ishlatish uchun eslatmalar.

item.name: 01 - Client Auth
item.description: Client login ketma-ketligi: Send OTP -> Verify OTP -> Register. Verify va Refresh tokenlarni avtomatik collection variablesga yozadi.

request.description: Telefon raqamga OTP yuboradi. Real OTP kodni DB/log/SMS stubdan olib otp_code variablega yozing.
OTP tasdiqlaydi va client_access_token/client_refresh_token ni saqlaydi.
Yangi client profili uchun PATCH ishlatiladi. Authorization: Bearer client token kerak.

item.name: Refresh Client Token - Save New Tokens

request.description: Eski refresh orqali yangi access va refresh token qaytaradi.
Accountni inactive qiladi. Ehtiyotkorlik bilan ishlating.
Map provider, default center/zoom, tracking_ws_template va auth_header qaytadi.

item.name: 10 - Admin Integration
item.description: Bu endpointlar DRF IsAdminUser talab qiladi. Postman Basic Auth orqali admin_username/admin_password ishlatiladi. Agar projectda faqat JWT ishlatilishi kerak bo'lsa, staff user auth strategiyasini alohida moslash kerak.

item.name: 11 - WebSocket Realtime (Header Auth)
item.description: Postman WebSocket testlari uchun URLlar. Token queryda emas, Authorization headerda yuboriladi.

request.description:
Client notification eventlarini realtime tinglash.

Postman'da WebSocket request sifatida oching va Headers qismiga aynan shuni qo'ying: Authorization: Bearer <access_token>. Token URL query orqali yuborilmaydi.

Master notification eventlarini realtime tinglash.

Postman'da WebSocket request sifatida oching va Headers qismiga aynan shuni qo'ying: Authorization: Bearer <access_token>. Token URL query orqali yuborilmaydi.

Client support chat realtime. Send: {"message":"Yordam kerak"}

Postman'da WebSocket request sifatida oching va Headers qismiga aynan shuni qo'ying: Authorization: Bearer <access_token>. Token URL query orqali yuborilmaydi.

Master support chat realtime. Send: {"message":"Javob matni"}

Postman'da WebSocket request sifatida oching va Headers qismiga aynan shuni qo'ying: Authorization: Bearer <access_token>. Token URL query orqali yuborilmaydi.

Master location yuboradi. Send: {"order_id":"{{order_id}}","lat":"41.30100000","lng":"69.25100000"}

Postman'da WebSocket request sifatida oching va Headers qismiga aynan shuni qo'ying: Authorization: Bearer <access_token>. Token URL query orqali yuborilmaydi.

Client buyurtma tracking eventlarini tinglaydi.

Postman'da WebSocket request sifatida oching va Headers qismiga aynan shuni qo'ying: Authorization: Bearer <access_token>. Token URL query orqali yuborilmaydi.
